_comment: Research-backed Arno-valley (Florence) climate, monthly. v2 2026-07-03: rebuilt from a 104-agent deep-research pass with adversarial verification (17 confirmed / 8 refuted claims). BASELINE = modern 1991-2020 NOAA/WMO normals for Firenze-Peretola: every quantitative medieval-adjustment claim (MCA warmer/drier, LIA -4C onset) FAILED verification, so per the research's synthesis we keep modern monthly means and instead layer the chronicle-verified era signature: multi-day autumn rain spells that can escalate to Arno flood risk (Villani: 1 Oct 1269 flood destroyed two bridges after two nights of rain; floods ~1283, 1284-85, 1288; famine rains 1302-03; the 4 Nov 1333 catastrophe was four days of sustained rain). See rainSpell block. Temperatures shave ~1C off 1991-2020 normals to remove recent anthropogenic warming — flagged DESIGNER JUDGMENT, not a verified figure. The weather picker rolls one condition per in-game day, SEEDED off the date (reproducible). Keyed by real Gregorian month NAME; GameCalendar is stile fiorentino — map by name, never index.

_derivation.rainProb: NOAA rainy days (>=1mm) / days-in-month, MINUS stormProb (storms are the convective subset of wet days — keeps total wet-day frequency matching the verified normals), floored at 0.02. NOAA days: 7.5/7.2/7.0/8.7/7.6/5.2/2.9/4.0/6.2/8.8/10.0/9.6 (Jan..Dec).
_derivation.stormProb: Directional from verified seasonality (Piani et al. 2005 NHESS + Aug-Sep convective rise): near-zero Dec-Feb, ramp Mar-Apr, peak Jun-Sep, taper Oct-Nov.
_derivation.hailProb: Rare subset of storm days, May-Sep centered (verified warm-season-only), near-zero winter.
_derivation.fogProb: DESIGN JUDGMENT — no fog claim survived verification (flagged open question). Winter-heavy Arno radiation fog kept from v1, directionally supported (Britannica, climatestotravel) but unquantified.
_derivation.windProb: DESIGN JUDGMENT — no verified windy-day counts. Winter tramontana / spring gust lean kept from v1.
_derivation.snowProb_sleetProb: DESIGN JUDGMENT bounded by verified near-freezing winter minima (Jan/Feb/Dec nights ~2.1-2.6C): small nonzero Dec-Feb, mostly Jan.
_derivation.tempC: [day high, night low] = 1991-2020 normals minus ~1C (designer pre-industrial shave). Mar/May/Jun interpolated from the same station series.

_sources: https://www.gutenberg.org/ebooks/33022 (Villani, Nuova Cronica — 1269 & 1280s Arno floods, verified verbatim)

rainSpell._comment: Chronicle-verified era layer: in autumn, a wet day can chain into the next (multi-day rain episode). Day >= heavyFromDay renders as Heavy Rain; day >= floodRiskFromDay sets FlorenceWeather.FloodRiskToday (hook for future WeatherEffects/story — a 1269/1333-style Arno swell). Chain rolls are seeded off the date: deterministic, save-proof.

months.name: January
months.note: Coldest month (verified 11.2/2.1C modern). Thick Arno-valley morning fog; occasional snow — nights hover just above freezing.

months.name: February
months.note: Still cold and damp; fog easing, tramontana spells as winter breaks.

months.name: March
months.note: Fiorentino new year. Unsettled, gusty; first convective storms of the season (verified Mar-Apr ramp).

months.name: April
months.note: Wettest of spring (verified 8.7 rain days). Showers between bright spells.

months.name: May
months.note: Warming fast; afternoon thunderstorms build — hail season opens (verified May-Sep window).

months.name: June
months.note: Hot and dry; most rain now arrives as sharp evening thunderstorms.

months.name: July
months.note: Driest month (verified 2.9 rain days, 24.6mm). Peak heat; violent but brief storms.

months.name: August
months.note: Hottest with July (verified 32.4C); the year's most dramatic thunderstorms, hail with the worst of them.

months.name: September
months.note: Breakdown begins (verified Aug-to-Sep wet rise). Storms still frequent; first autumn rain spells possible.

months.name: October
months.note: Autumn peak begins (verified 8.8 rain days). Game starts 1 Ottobre 1299 — thirty years to the night after the 1269 flood took both bridges.

months.name: November
months.note: Wettest month of the year (verified 10.0 rain days, 115mm). Deep gloom; the 1333 flood month.

months.name: December
months.note: Cold, damp, foggy (verified 9.6 rain days); rare snow dustings.
